chain_edges.notes: Broader AI-capex 10-Q footnote disclosure pressure feeds the same buyside-attention threshold logic into physical-AI capex segmentation.
AI-revenue disclosure rewrite establishes the Sept-30 10-Q as the venue where physical-AI capex breakout naturally lands.

relations.notes: Both forecast 10-Q footnote AI disclosure under buyside pressure; focal is physical-AI capex, peer is broader AI-business KPIs.

Same disclosure-rewrite thesis on a different revenue/cost surface; not competing outcomes.

SEC AI-revenue concept release and voluntary physical-AI capex footnote are independent regulatory- vs market-driven disclosure paths.
